holdings.infoBox: AAXJ is an equity ETF with a total of 967 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 16.32%, Samsung Electronics at 9.18%, SK hynix at 7.36%, Tencent Holdings at 3.18%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 2.06%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI All Country Asia ex Japan ETF (AAXJ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI AC Asia ex JP index. The fund tracks a market-cap weighted index that holds securities from global markets in Asia, excluding Japan. AAXJ was launched on Aug 13, 2008 and is issued by BlackRock.
